The properties of this 3,905,004,698 fact are: Period :2024-09-30 Dimensions : us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=us-gaap:DefinedBenefitPlanCommonCollectiveTrustMember, us-gaap-ebp:EmployeeBenefitPlanNonconsolidatedMasterTrustAndPlanInterestInMasterTrustAxis=us-gaap-ebp:EmployeeBenefitPlanNonconsolidatedMasterTrustMember, dei:LegalEntityAxis=emr:EBP016Member
Rule Element Id:10602 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - emr-20260312.htm 8
